slots.name: testimonials
slots.notes: Array of testimonials: { quote, author_name, author_title, author_company, author_avatar?, rating? }. Minimum of 3 items.

layout_variants.name: Speech Bubble Cloud
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Free-form layout with asymmetrical speech bubbles of varying sizes, arranged dynamically like a conversation cloud. Each bubble features a premium, ultra-thin rounded glassmorphic frame (backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/45 border border-white/10), with randomly pointing tail tips to inject organic rhythm. Circular customer avatars float around bubbles. Uses [Heading Font] for author details and [Body Font] for quotes. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Upon scroll trigger, speech bubbles swell up dynamically (scale spring) offset from each other. Step 2: Customer avatars slide out from behind the bubbles. On scroll: Speech bubbles drift horizontally (parallax) in opposite directions on scroll down. On scroll up: All bubbles shrink and fade. Hover Interaction: The hovered bubble lifts by 5px while adjacent avatars perform a gentle circular rotation.

layout_variants.name: Avatar Wave & Center Quote
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Circular customer avatars arranged along a fluid curve (avatar wave line). A giant testimonial quote displays at the center, using [Heading Font] for refined editorial elegance. When an avatar is clicked or hovered, it illuminates with a thin neon ring and its corresponding testimonial quote fades into the center view. Author titles use [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Step 1: The avatar lineup slides in from left to right like a hand-sketched wave. Step 2: The first quote slides up in the center. On scroll up: The entire section fades out. Hover Interaction: The hovered avatar swells by 1.2x using bouncy spring physics, while other avatars fade to 40% opacity to highlight focus.

layout_variants.name: Bento Masonry Columns
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Irregular masonry grid featuring items with variable heights (gap-6) to create a lively, unconstrained rhythm. Cards employ translucent glassmorphism. Some cards display large typographic quotes in bold [Heading Font] for artistic emphasis, some present large portrait images with handwritten signatures, and others contain glowing golden 5-star ratings. Long quotes use readable [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Cards slide up in a staggered column-weave pattern (80ms stagger). On scroll up: Reverse animations to fade cards out. Hover Interaction: Pushes card up by 8px via spring transition while a soft emerald border glow illuminates.

layout_variants.name: Split Spotlight Card
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Grand split 50/50 focal layout. The left column holds an artistic portrait/short video feedback inside a thin glass border. The right column showcases a giant quote in [Heading Font] sitting over a soft indigo spotlight glow, with author details and handwritten signatures styled in [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Step 1: The main card expands with a subtle center zoom. Step 2: The left portrait slides in from the left while the right text reveals via line-reveal from below. On scroll up: Card shrinks and fades out. Hover Interaction: The spotlight glow performs a breathing expansion loop.

layout_variants.name: Infinite Testimonial Marquee
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Infinite horizontal scrolling testimonial cards (marquee). Cards feature premium glassmorphic blocks (backdrop-blur bg-slate-950/40 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl) containing quotes in [Body Font] and author details in [Heading Font]. Soft gradient masks on left/right edges create smooth visual fades. Entrance Animation: Marquee tracks slide left automatically. Hover Interaction: Marquee speed slows down by 80% to allow reading. Hovered card lifts by 6px with a subtle neon border glow, while surrounding cards fade to 30% opacity (focus overlay) to draw focus.

header.intent: Header entrance effect: Step 1: Heading slides up (y: 24px -> 0px) and fades in (opacity: 0 -> 1) over 500ms on viewport trigger. On scroll up: Reverses animation to hide heading.

cards.intent: Card entrance effect: Step 1: Cards initialize hidden (y: 24px, opacity: 0). Step 2: Cards slide up staggered (80ms stagger) over 450ms. On scroll up: Reverses animation to hide cards.

card_hover.intent: Defines 3 premium hover interactions when hovering over a testimonial card: spring lift & neon glow, sibling blur (focus overlay), and 3D kinetic card flip.

spec.back_card_content: LinkedIn link, author bio text, or project feedback details

quote_expand.intent: Read More expansion on long quotes: Step 1: Triggers Framer Motion AnimatePresence. Step 2: Card height expands smoothly from clamped height to 'auto' (0 -> auto). On collapse: Reverses height contraction.

quote_mark.intent: Oversized background quote mark watermark: Step 1: Renders faded by default (opacity: 5%). Step 2: Card hover translates the watermark down by 4px to create 3D Parallax. On hover exit: Resets to initial position.

star_rating.intent: Star rating paint effect: Step 1: Triggers after the card entrance finishes. Step 2: Stars fill gold sequentially from left to right after a 300ms delay.

in.description: Usually changes to a white or very light background to ensure high readability of review text.

out.description: Transitions into pricing typically require a distinct visual separator.

flow.notes: Social proof preceding pricing is critical to reduce buyer friction right before the conversion point.
